name: German Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, fry the bacon until crispy. Remove and set aside 1 tablespoon of the rendered fat.
2. Add the chopped onions to the skillet and sauté until they are tender and translucent.
3. Add the drained green beans, vinegar, and sugar. Stir to combine and heat through for about 5 minutes, or until heated thoroughly.
